content.text:
Implemented the fix without committing.

What changed:
- Updated `packages/core/src/extensions/tiptap-extensions/KeyboardShortcuts/KeyboardShortcutsExtension.ts`
- The Backspace handler path that moves a block into a preceding `columnList` now only runs when:
  - the selection is empty,
  - the cursor is at the start of the current block,
  - and the current block is not an empty inline-content block.

Why:
- Previously, this multi-column-specific Backspace handler could run even when Backspace should be handled by normal text/empty-block deletion logic.
- That allowed rapid Backspace after a column layout to move/delete structural nodes at the wrong time, leading to unstable ProseMirror positions and the reported `RangeError: Position X out of range`.

Validation:
- Added a temporary focused regression test reproducing the unsafe Backspace behavior around a `columnList`.
- Confirmed it failed before/while narrowing the fix and passed after the fix.
- Per instructions, removed the temporary test before finishing.
- Ran existing focused test file successfully:

```bash
pnpm --filter @blocknote/xl-multi-column exec vitest --run --config vite.config.ts src/test/commands/removeBlocks.test.ts
```

Result:
- `10 passed`

Remaining working tree:
- Only source fix remains modified.
- There is an existing untracked `reports/` directory; I did not touch it.
